scripts.preinstall: node -e "if(process.env.SKIP_NODE_VERSION_CHECK==='1')process.exit(0);const m=Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]);if(Number.isFinite(m)&&m>=24){console.error(['Unsupported Node.js version for this repo:','  Detected: '+process.version,'','This project requires Node 20 (as in CI) for Prisma engines to work.','Install/switch to Node 20 and re-run: npm ci'].join('\n'));process.exit(1)}"
